title: ET13372162 Accounts Executive (Permanent)
description:
The Company

A well-established organization in the shipping industry is currently seeking an Accounts Executive to join their dynamic team.

The Role

This role is responsible for preparing financial statements and XBRL filings while supporting the Corporate/Group Finance team in day-to-day general ledger activities. Key responsibilities include performing and resolving intercompany reconciliations, posting and maintaining treasury-related entries, and preparing loan, interest, capitalised interest, and upfront fee schedules. The role also involves assisting with journal entries, validating financial data, reviewing project costs, and coordinating with internal stakeholders to clear intercompany differences.

Your Profile

The ideal candidate holds a minimum Diploma in Accountancy or an equivalent qualification, with 2 to 3 years of relevant work experience, preferably within the shipping industry. Experience working in an ERP system environment, including involvement in system implementation projects, is required. Strong interpersonal and communication skills, with proficiency in both spoken and written English, are essential.

Apply Today

Please send your resume, in WORD format only and quote reference number ET13372162, by clicking the apply button. Please note that only short-listed candidates will be contacted.

Robert Half International Pte Ltd. Co. Registration no.: 200612189E | EA Licence no.: 07C5595 | Tan Yee Le (Elise) EA Registration no.: R1330020

postedCompany.description:
ROBERT HALF INTERNATIONAL PTE. LTD.


Founded in 1948, Robert Half (NYSE symbol: RHI) pioneered specialised recruitment services and today - with more than 325 staffing locations worldwide - Robert Half is the world's leader in placing accounting, finance, banking and technology professionals on a temporary and permanent basis.

In Singapore, Robert Half operates four divisions:

  • Robert Half Finance and Accounting: Recruitment services for temporary and permanent finance and accounting personnel
  • Robert Half Financial Services: Recruitment services for high-calibre financial services, insurance and banking professionals
  • Robert Half Management Resources: Recruitment services for senior-level finance, accounting and business systems professionals on a project and interim basis
  • Robert Half Technology: Recruitment services for temporary and permanent IT professionals

Robert Half also is the parent company of Protiviti®, a global consulting and internal audit firm composed of experts in risk, advisory and transaction services.
